response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, aligning with core requirements, but his seniority (Staff/Senior roles) exceeds the entry-level nature of the role, and his German language skill is only basic despite high on-site presence in Berlin being required.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record with PostgreSQL-like SQL, Docker, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Active contributor to open-source and developer tooling, including AI-agent infrastructure
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; risk of misalignment in responsibility expectations
German language proficiency is only basic, but high on-site presence in Berlin is required
Extensive use of DLang and niche tools may indicate mismatch with team's primary stack
